features: WASH AWAY DIRT: Keep your hands clean and help to wash away dirt and bacteria when you use Palmolive Aquarium Liquid Hand Soap.
FUN UNDERWATER DESIGNS: Our liquid soap is delightfully fragranced and comes in four magical designs featuring your favourite fish.
NATURAL ORIGIN INGREDIENTS: Our vegan hand wash is made with ingredients of 96% natural origin*. (*Water and naturally sourced ingredients with limited processing.)
98% BIODEGRADABLE FORMULA: Being thoughtful, our liquid soap has a 98% biodegradable formula and comes in a bottle that you can recycle after removing the pump.
DERMATOLOGICALLY TESTED: Our hand soap has also been dermatologically tested.
Palmolive Aquarium Liquid Hand Soap is a fun underwater addition to your bathroom that helps to wash away dirt and bacteria. The vegan hand soap has a 98% biodegradable formula.
